docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (LISTED AGENT FOR SERVICE: FIONA FRIE MD) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELKINA, OLGA AS TO DEFENDANT BE CLINICAL
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. CONTINUED TO AUGUST 9, 2021 AT 1:30 P.M. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,980.00 FILED BY BELKINA, OLGA AS TO DEFENDANT BE CLINICAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: CASE FILE RETAINED IN THE COURTROOM FOR HEARING ON 8-9-21 @ 1:30 A.M.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-20-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BE CLINICAL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) GEORGE FRIE, PRESIDENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BE CLINICAL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-09-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OLGA BELKINA, ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPERTER LILIYA SHTAUBER IS PRESENT. INTERPRETERS OATH IS GIVEN. DEFENDANT BE CLINICAL, REPRESENTED BY GEORGE FRIE, OWNER IS PRESENT. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS REACHED. DEFENDANT BE CLINICAL, THROUGH GEORGE FRIE, PRESIDENT, PAYS PLAINTIFF, OLGA BELKINA THE AMOUNT OF $2000.00 BY COMPANY CHECK IN OPEN COURT. A PROGRESS REPORT DATE IS SET. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF TERMS OF THIS AGREEMENT ARE MET, AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
